name: Roasted Garlic ( How to )
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 275°F (135°C).
2. Remove the papery outer layers from one whole head of garlic.
3. Cut off the top of the garlic head, exposing the cloves.
4. Drizzle olive oil over the head of garlic, then sprinkle with salt and pepper to taste.
5. Wrap in foil and bake for 2 hours.
6. Sprinkle grated cheese and fresh herbs (optional) after the first hour of baking.
7. To serve: Squeeze garlic paste from the garlic clove onto crackers or sliced bread and spread.
8. Roasted garlic can be added to most recipes that call for garlic. It is very mild compared to raw garlic.
